description: Add diff score display to battle Header component
context:
Beads description:
Display the live diff score prominently in the battle header.

## File: src/lib/battle_mode/Header.svelte

## IMPORTANT: Graffiti-First CSS
Check https://graffiti-ui.com/llms.txt before writing any CSS.
The Header likely already uses Graffiti patterns - maintain consistency.

## Current Header
The Header component shows:
- Battle info
- Countdown timer
- Custom snippets

## Enhancement
Add a score indicator showing:
- Current similarity percentage
- Visual indicator (color-coded)
- Optional mini diff thumbnail

## Reuse from DiffPreview
If DiffPreview.svelte creates a ScoreBadge pattern, REUSE it here.
Don't duplicate the score display styling.

```svelte
<!-- Option: Extract score display to shared component -->
<ScoreBadge score={diffScore} size="sm" />
```

## Design Options

### Option A: Score badge next to countdown
Use existing header layout, add score badge inline.
```
[Target: Nature Scene] [12:45 remaining] [87.3% match]
```

### Option B: Score in its own section
Larger display with trend indicator (improving/declining).

### Option C: Animated score bar
Progress bar that fills based on score - check if Graffiti has progress utilities.

## Implementation
1. Check if score display should be a shared component
2. Use Graffiti color/state utilities for score states
3. Use existing header spacing/layout patterns
4. Add smooth transition animations (Graffiti transition utilities?)

## Props to add
```ts
interface HeaderProps {
  // existing...
  diffScore?: number | null;
  showDiffScore?: boolean;
}
```

## Acceptance Criteria
- Score visible in header during battle
- Reuses score styling from DiffPreview (not duplicated)
- Fits naturally with existing header design
- Uses Graffiti utilities, minimal scoped CSS
